name: CSX CORP
summary: CSX Corp is the parent company of CSX Transportation, Inc., a Virginia corporation and its primary significant subsidiary. The filing indicates CSX is a registered holding company with consolidated subsidiaries. Based on the filing, CSX Transportation operates as the core business entity, though specific services, products, or operational details are not described in this excerpt.
